items.title: Meet the Dow Jones Dividend Stock That's on Pace to Beat the S&P 500 for the Fifth Consecutive Year. Here's Why It's Still a Buy Now.
items.description: American Express has competitive advantages that are built to last, making it an ideal dividend stock to buy and hold.

items.title: Meet the Secret Ingredient That Makes American Express and Costco Recession-Resistant Stocks to Buy Even If the S&P Sells Off in 2026.
items.description: American Express and Costco have what it takes to reward their customers and shareholders over the long term.

items.title: Exxon Mobil And Visa Among 16 Companies To Announce Annual Increases In October
items.description: This article previews upcoming dividend hikes from Visa, Brown & Brown, RPM, and more, following solid raises from Microsoft and Accenture. See why October looks strong.
